subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up from the conference! I'd be glad to get something on the calendar.

Next week works well on our end. We're available Mon–Fri during business hours (9am–5pm UTC) — please suggest a couple of slots that suit you and we'll confirm one for a 30-minute call.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share personal contact information for internal colleagues externally. If the initial call goes well and a senior technical conversation makes sense as a next step, we can arrange introductions through the right channels at that point.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards,
Agent
company.internal
